wikitext.*: {{Infobox Team|isdisbanded=yes |name= Noah's Ark |orgcountry= China |country= |region= CN |image= NAlogo.png |coaches= |manager= Chen '''"Huniu"''' Fanhui |captain= |website= |sponsor= |created= September 2011 |disbanded= August 2012 |trades= }}{{TOCRWI}} == Overview == Canis Lupus Campestris eSports Club participated in the TGA 2011 as the Huazhong Division Champions and in the WCG 2011 Qualifiers. They achieved several notable finishes in China’s Circuit tournaments. In March 2012, former [[Invictus Gaming]] player Wh1t3zZ joined the team. [http://lol.sgamer.com/201203/news-detail-124248.html Interview with former IG Captain Wh1t3zZ now Join CLC] ''"sgamer.com"'' '''Noah's Ark''' acquired Canis Lupus Campestris eSports Club's League of Legends team on July 7, 2012. http://lol.178.com/201207/135641600309.html NA.LoL was disbanded on August 26 after their roster transferred to [[OMG]]. == History == {{TeamNews}} == Player Roster == ===Former=== {{TeamMembersFormer}} == Organization == {|class="sortable wikitable" ! !ID !Name !Position !Next Team |- {{listplayersp|Huniu|cn|Chen Fang-Hui (陈芳辉) |align=center|'''Manager''' |newteam=vg}} {{Listplayer/EndTemp}} == Tournaments == {{TeamResults|show=overviewpage}} {{TeamShowmatchResults|show=overviewpage}} === As Canis Lupus Campestris === {{TeamResults|Canis Lupus Campestris|show=overviewpage}} == Highlight Videos == ==Interviews== == Images == File:Clclogo.png|Logo for CLC ==Links== * [http://www.tatazu.com/index.php?action-viewnews-itemid-30285 StarsWar 7 Team Profile] ==References==
